calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2019 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Aug-15-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Mission Hub LLC, a California limited liability company.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768. Email: casey.giselle@gmail.com.

Christopher A. Rheinheimer, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Turner Construction Company, a New York corporation.
Dan Wheeler, General Manager for plaintiff Turner Construction Company, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Mission Hub LLC, a Calfornia limited liability company.
Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Sublease was filed on March 6, 2019, and personally served on defendant Mission Hub LLC, a California limited liability company, on March 11, 2019.
Default as to defendant Mission Hub LLC, a California limited liability company, was entered on April 11, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on May 17, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Turner Construction Company, a New York corporation, and against the default defendant Mission Hub LLC, a California limited liability company, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $61,250.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $14,011.30.
Attorney Fees - $2,800.00.
Costs - $520.75.

Total - $78,582.05.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2019 Continued To Oct-02-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jun-27-2019 Continued
